intake.refinement_summary: Structured from the rough brief with the local fallback refiner for consulting work.

handoff_notes:
2026-04-15: reassigned from consultant to coach because consultant is not currently bound in openclaw.json and intake ownership defaults to coach.
2026-04-23 14:44: Started work. Reviewed workspace structure, SYSTEM-MAP, TARGET-ARCHITECTURE, ROADMAP. Key finding: consulting workflow gaps are real — there's no dedicated consulting repo, tasks are spread across rook-workspace with mixed maturity, and the role-workspace model (workspace-engineer, workspace-coach etc.) is still local-only and awkward.
